challenges.title: Basic Form with Inputs
challenges.description: Create a <form> with a text input, an email input, each with a <label>, and a submit button. Assign your code to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Create a basic form with text, email, and submit -->

"""
challenges.test_code:
assert '<form' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <form> tag'
assert '</form>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a closing </form> tag'
assert html.lower().count('<label') >= 2, 'Should contain at least two <label> elements'
assert 'type="text"' in html.lower() or "type='text'" in html.lower(), 'Should contain a text input'
assert 'type="email"' in html.lower() or "type='email'" in html.lower(), 'Should contain an email input'
assert 'type="submit"' in html.lower() or "type='submit'" in html.lower(), 'Should contain a submit button'
hints: Use <input type="text"> for text and <input type="email"> for email.
Each input should have a matching <label> for accessibility.

challenges.title: Form with Validation and Textarea
challenges.description: Create a form with required text and email inputs (use the required attribute), placeholder text on each input, a <textarea> for a message, and a submit button. Wrap each field with a <label>. Assign your code to the variable `html`.
challenges.starter_code:
html = """
<!-- Create a form with validation, placeholders, and textarea -->

"""
challenges.test_code:
assert '<form' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <form> tag'
assert 'type="text"' in html.lower() or "type='text'" in html.lower(), 'Should contain a text input'
assert 'type="email"' in html.lower() or "type='email'" in html.lower(), 'Should contain an email input'
assert html.lower().count('required') >= 2, 'Should have at least two required fields'
assert html.lower().count('placeholder') >= 2, 'Should have placeholder text on at least two inputs'
assert '<textarea' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a <textarea> element'
assert '</textarea>' in html.lower(), 'Should contain a closing </textarea> tag'
assert html.lower().count('<label') >= 3, 'Should contain at least three labels'
assert 'type="submit"' in html.lower() or "type='submit'" in html.lower(), 'Should contain a submit button'
hints: Add the required attribute directly on the input: <input type="text" required>
Use placeholder="Enter your name" to show hint text inside the input.
